description: Naive distogram readout (same as exp20): <begin_statements> with no seeded contacts, read top-128 logprobs per pair, renormalize over the 64 <d_X.X> bins.

Same readout as baseline_naive, restricted to (i, j) pairs where GT CB-CB distance < 15 A (LDDT inclusion radius). Point lddt_distogram_cb identical to baseline by construction; MAE/dRMSD/contact-precision columns are biased and should be ignored. GT-aware speedup intended to free wall-clock budget for richer algorithms.
